fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code assigned to the service contract account group.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the service contract account group.

fields.name: Non-Prepaid Contract Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number for the non-prepaid account.

fields.name: Prepaid Contract Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number for the prepaid account.
